supports.context: ear case Monday: Shorter-term, ES can dip on the failure of 6453…For the 6453 short ideally one needs to see either a test t

highlights.text: I wrote on Friday: “Bear case Monday: Shorter-term, ES can dip on the failure of 6453…For the 6453 short ideally one needs to see either a test there and strong bounce first.
My lean was ES could do that today, and the objective for bulls is to test, then recover the zone.
My general lean is we backtest 6461-65.
The most common sequence goes is what I call Elevator Down-into-Short Squeeze.
Always the same thing: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
While we saw a good sell today, bulls managed to buy the dip and defend yesterdays low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the quality Failed Breakdowns we had last week/this week, and I’ll also discuss yesterdays rare short.
Its important to “do the reps” with Failed Breakdowns and see as many as possible to build pattern recognition.

post_title: Can SPX Bulls Hold The Current Low? Sept 4th Plan
